executiveSummary: Today's AI picture is being shaped by frontier research, open-source stack, workflow orchestration. The strongest signals point to a market where research progress, platform controls, and workflow execution are converging into more operational buying criteria.
strategicTakeaways: Research matters most when it changes the product and deployment baseline, not only leaderboard positioning.
The open-source layer is turning into a strategic option set for AI stack design, not only a hobbyist ecosystem.
Execution architecture is becoming more important than one-shot generation quality in operational AI.
businessImpactSummary: This signal matters because it changes how teams in engineering can structure AI-assisted execution, evaluation, or governance. This signal matters because it changes how teams in risk can structure AI-assisted execution, evaluation, or governance.
predictionUpdates: Platform competition will shift toward reliability, controls, and integration depth
Knowledge systems will become shared internal infrastructure rather than side projects
Customer-facing AI will move from summarization into guided action layers
